{{Quote|This is only the first of our victories! We won this vote, and our mighty army will win this war!|Needo Farr|<ref name="Hnn" />}}
'''Needo Farr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] who served as a member of the [[Legislative Youth Program/Legends|Legislative Youth Program]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Farr and his fellow trainees traveled to [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Hanna City/Legends|Hanna City]], for a simulation of the vote on the [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]], a bill that authorized the creation of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|army]]. Unlike [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] delegate [[Dashé Borreno]], he voted in favor of the act. The "Yes" side won by a margin of 52 to 48 percent.<ref name="Hnn" />

==Behind the scenes==
Needo Farr made his first and only appearance in the ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 50]]'' article ''Legislative Youth Program Role-Plays Vote''. It was published in [[2002]] on the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] website.<ref name="Hnn" />
